# CWE-826: Premature Release of Resource During Expected Lifetime (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-826-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: waits for the worker to finish before releasing the database handle.
func WarmCache(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(c.Request.Context(), 2*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	done := make(chan struct{})
	go func() {
		_, _ = db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT 1")
		close(done)
	}()
	<-done
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
